title: lathyrus brachycalyx subsp. zionis
intro: Lathyrus brachycalyx subsp. zionis, also known as Zion's pea or Zion's sweet pea, is a plant species within the legume family, characterized by its unique flowers and growth habits. Traditionally, the plant's seeds have been used in herbal medicine due to their potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming the seeds may offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Lathyrus brachycalyx subsp. zionis seeds are sometimes prepared as a tea or added to herbal supplements, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
